title: KITCHENDAO 2 in 1 Lemon Orange Citrus Juicer with lid for Sanitary Storage, Manual Hand Squeezer with Built-in 16OZ Measuring Cup, Multi-function Manual Juicer with Reamers and Non-Slip Base, BPA Free
features: Upgraded BPA Free Material: Instead of ABS that is widely used by the other producers, KITCHENDAO Manual Citrus Juicer is made of BPA Free AS material, which offers exceptional corrosion resistance to the lemon and orange juice. Never worried about that the plastic will get cloudy or bumpy
2 in 1: Small size reamer is designed to extract maximum juice, fully squeezing every lemon or lime, while a Large size reamer applies to extract orange and other bigger fruits

Built-in Lid and Measuring Marks: With built-in lid, it’s quite sanitary to store extra juice in the fridge and to store the lemon/orange juicer in the drawer. 16OZ cup with measuring marks on the side
Anti-slip Ring: With anti-slip ring on the bottom, it enhances the stability during use
Dishwasher Safe: Our citrus juicer is very easy to clean. Wash it with running water or put it into the dishwasher
description: Product Description By KITCHENDAO 2 IN 1 CITRUS JUICER WITH LID The must-have juicer for home and travel - the ultimate solution to turning lemons, oranges, and other fruits into refreshing juice. This juicer not only features efficient extraction capabilities, but also comes with a lid, allowing you to store your freshly squeezed juice. It even doubles as a portable companion, making it the ideal choice for camping trips. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. Next page 1 2 IN 1 Reamers 2 Upgraded Material 3 Sanitary Storage 4 Dishwasher Safe 5 Anti-Slip What is the size of the citrus juicer? The 2 in 1 citrus juicer with lid is 3.38x3.38x4.72 inches.Its capacity is 500ml / 16 oz. What material is this juicer made of? Will the cup become cloudy after use like others? KITCHENDAO Citrus juicers are made from food-grade AS material, are BPA-free, and have excellent acid resistance without having to worry about plastic getting cloudy or bumpy. Is this juicer dishwasher safe? Yes, this KITCHENDAO citrus juicer is dishwasher safe.
